title: elisma natans
intro: Elisma natans is a type of aquatic plant, also known as water velvet or water cloak, that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elisma natans include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, as well as having potential applications in treating skin conditions and infections. Elisma natans can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
